productName: Joints- 2 pack Bubble Hash Infused- DOH / Gelonade (SH)
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Gelonade supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of ammonia, lemon, and pepper, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
